text: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day after day.
author: Robert Collier

text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success. If you love what you are doing, you will be successful.
author: Albert Schweitzer

text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
author: Henry David Thoreau

text: Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
author: John D. Rockefeller

text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
author: Thomas Jefferson

text: Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
author: Winston Churchill

text: If you really want to do something, you'll find a way. If you don't, you'll find an excuse.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Successful people do what unsuccessful people are not willing to do. Don't wish it were easier; wish you were better.
author: Jim Rohn

text: The ones who are crazy enough to think they can change the world, are the ones who do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Do one thing every day that scares you.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: All progress takes place outside the comfort zone.
author: Michael John Bobak

text: Success is knowing your purpose in life, growing to reach your maximum potential, and sowing seeds that benefit others.
author: John C. Maxwell

text: The road to success and the road to failure are almost exactly the same.
author: Colin R. Davis

text: To succeed in your mission, you must have single-minded devotion to your goal.
author: A.P.J. Abdul Kalam

text: Success depends upon previous preparation, and without such preparation there is sure to be failure.
author: Confucius

text: There are no secrets to success. It is the result of preparation, hard work, and learning from failure.
author: Colin Powell

text: Always bear in mind that your own resolution to succeed is more important than any other one thing.
author: Abraham Lincoln

text: The starting point of all achievement is desire.
author: Napoleon Hill

text: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
author: Wayne Gretzky

text: Success is how high you bounce when you hit bottom.
author: George S. Patton

text: Before anything else, preparation is the key to success.
author: Alexander Graham Bell

text: Patience, persistence and perspiration make an unbeatable combination for success.
author: Napoleon Hill

text: Ambition is the path to success. Persistence is the vehicle you arrive in.
author: Bill Bradley

text: Failure is the condiment that gives success its flavor.
author: Truman Capote

text: Success is getting what you want, happiness is wanting what you get.
author: W. P. Kinsella

text: The difference between a successful person and others is not a lack of strength, not a lack of knowledge, but rather a lack of in will.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: Character cannot be developed in ease and quiet. Only through experience of trial and suffering can the soul be strengthened, ambition inspired, and success achieved.
author: Helen Keller

text: Success produces confidence.
author: Jack Nicklaus

text: Try not to become a man of success. Rather become a man of value.
author: Albert Einstein

text: To be successful you must accept all challenges that come your way. You can't just accept the ones you like.
author: Mike Gafka

text: Success is a journey, not a destination. The doing is often more important than the outcome.
author: Arthur Ashe

text: Let us make our future now, and let us make our dreams tomorrow's reality.
author: Malala Yousafzai

text: Don't let what you cannot do interfere with what you can do.
author: John Wooden

text: Whenever you see a successful person, you only see the public glories, never the private sacrifices to reach them.
author: Vaibhav Shah

text: Success is doing ordinary things extraordinarily well.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: Opportunity does not knock, it presents itself when you beat down the door.
author: Kyle Chandler

text: Your success and happiness lies in you.
author: Helen Keller

text: Success is simple. Do what's right, the right way, at the right time.
author: Arnold H. Glasow

text: Focus on the journey, not the destination. Joy is found not in finishing an activity but in doing it.
author: Greg Anderson
